best_hook_patterns: Identity: 'You didn't open a shop to become an admin.'
Result-first: '47 bookings. $3,240 revenue. Zero phone calls.'
Specific day: 'Your Monday chair is empty. Here's why.'
key_insights: Reels drive reach (643–856), Feed posts drive engagement rate (57.7% avg ER)
Social Proof is Noble's sharpest weapon — 59% ER proves content-market fit
Education Reels are the only format that wins both reach AND saves simultaneously
DM shares are the top algorithmic signal — add 'Send this to a barber who needs it' to every Reel
Sunday ENGAGE (not CONVERT) — 748 reach wasted on 25.94% ER when promotional
5.5% save rate across week (223 saves / 4024 reach) — well above 1-2% industry benchmark
Follow CTAs are missing — reach is strong but zero follower conversion; add explicit follow prompt to 3+ posts
strategist_note: Week 2026-W28: 0 reach, 0 saves. Top format: N/A. Best ER: 0% (N/A day 0). Sunday is always ENGAGE — never CONVERT.
